notes: Object storage pricing per GB-month, single region. Three tiers normalized across clouds: 'hot' (frequent access, eg S3 Standard), 'cool' (infrequent access, eg S3 IA / Blob Cool), 'archive' (eg S3 Glacier Deep Archive / Blob Archive). EGRESS, REQUEST, and RETRIEVAL costs are NOT modeled — these are often the hidden killer in real-world bills. OCI Always Free includes 20 GB Object Storage perpetually; we represent this with an Always-Free SKU at $0/GB-mo with capacity_gb_limit=20.

oci._notes: Verified against Oracle Public Pricing API on 2026-05-04. OCI offers Always Free 20 GB perpetual; we expose that as a separate SKU. Beyond Always Free, paid Standard rate is $0.0255/GB-mo (sourced from Oracle pricing page; the public API shows $0 for the Always-Free SKU which is misleading without context).
